'''âj-b-ch''' ('''kajabach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:name|name]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:name|name]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-b-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kajabach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijabach|thijabach]] || [[word:jijabach|jijabach]] || [[word:shijabach|shijabach]] || [[word:kijabach|kijabach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujabach|thuthujabach]] || [[word:jujujabach|jujujabach]] || [[word:shushujabach|shushujabach]] || [[word:kukujabach|kukujabach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujabach|thujabach]] || [[word:jujabach|jujabach]] || [[word:shujabach|shujabach]] || [[word:kujabach|kujabach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujabach|thujabach]] || [[word:jujabach|jujabach]] || [[word:shujabach|shujabach]] || [[word:kujabach|kujabach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejabach|thejabach]] || [[word:jejabach|jejabach]] || [[word:shejabach|shejabach]] || [[word:kejabach|kejabach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojabach|thothojabach]] || [[word:jojojabach|jojojabach]] || [[word:shoshojabach|shoshojabach]] || [[word:kokojabach|kokojabach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojabach|thojabach]] || [[word:jojabach|jojabach]] || [[word:shojabach|shojabach]] || [[word:kojabach|kojabach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojabach|thojabach]] || [[word:jojabach|jojabach]] || [[word:shojabach|shojabach]] || [[word:kojabach|kojabach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjabach|thĂŠjabach]] || [[word:jĂŠjabach|jĂŠjabach]] || [[word:shĂŠjabach|shĂŠjabach]] || [[word:kĂŠjabach|kĂŠjabach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajabach|thathajabach]] || [[word:jajajabach|jajajabach]] || [[word:shashajabach|shashajabach]] || [[word:kakajabach|kakajabach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajabach|thajabach]] || [[word:jajabach|jajabach]] || [[word:shajabach|shajabach]] || [[word:kajabach|kajabach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajabach|thajabach]] || [[word:jajabach|jajabach]] || [[word:shajabach|shajabach]] || [[word:kajabach|kajabach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajabach|shajabach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajabach|goshajabach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajabach|gokishajabach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajabachnĂŒ|shajabachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajabachnknĂŒ|goshajabachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabachnĂŒ|gokishajabachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajabachshĂ«|shajabachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajabachnkshĂ«|goshajabachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajabachshĂ«|gokishajabachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabachro|shajabachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabachnkro|goshajabachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabachro|gokishajabachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabachmu|shajabachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabachnkmu|goshajabachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabachmu|gokishajabachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajabachsher|shajabachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajabachnksher|goshajabachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajabachsher|gokishajabachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajabachng|shajabachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajabachnkng|goshajabachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajabachng|gokishajabachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajabachya|shajabachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajabachnkya|goshajabachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajabachya|gokishajabachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajabachyam|shajabachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajabachnkyam|goshajabachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajabachyam|gokishajabachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajabachnĂŒshĂ«|shajabachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajabachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajabachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajabachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajabachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabachnĂŒro|shajabachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabachnknĂŒro|goshajabachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabachnĂŒro|gokishajabachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabachnĂŒmu|shajabachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabachnknĂŒmu|goshajabachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabachnĂŒmu|gokishajabachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajabachshĂ«nĂŒ|shajabachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajabachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajabachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajabachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabachshĂ«ro|shajabachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabachnkshĂ«ro|goshajabachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabachshĂ«ro|gokishajabachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabachshĂ«mu|shajabachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabachnkshĂ«mu|goshajabachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabachshĂ«mu|gokishajabachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajabachronĂŒ|shajabachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajabachnkronĂŒ|goshajabachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabachronĂŒ|gokishajabachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajabachroshĂ«|shajabachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajabachnkroshĂ«|goshajabachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajabachroshĂ«|gokishajabachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabachromu|shajabachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabachnkromu|goshajabachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabachromu|gokishajabachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajabachmunĂŒ|shajabachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajabachnkmunĂŒ|goshajabachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabachmunĂŒ|gokishajabachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajabachmushĂ«|shajabachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajabachnkmushĂ«|goshajabachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajabachmushĂ«|gokishajabachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabachmuro|shajabachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabachnkmuro|goshajabachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabachmuro|gokishajabachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
